name: Diabetic Bagel Chips
recipeInstructions:
1. Slice the bagel very thinly with a sharp knife.
2. Sprinkle with garlic powder or one of your choice before baking or leave plain.
3. Bake on a cookie sheet at 250 to 275 degrees until crisp and cracker-like.
4. Each bagel is equal to 2 starches.
This recipe was given to me by a dietician at Riverside Hospital, in Newport News, Va.
